foreground.c(3) Library Functions Manual foreground.c(3)

NAME

foreground.c

SYNOPSIS

Functions


char * image_print (const image_t *p, const char *palette)
Print image as ASCII art (monochrome). void quantize_color (int *r, int *g, int *b, int levels)
Quantize color to specified number of levels. char * image_print_color (const image_t *p, const char *palette)
Print image as ASCII art with color. char * image_print_color_utf8 (const image_t *p, const char *palette)
char * rgb_to_ansi_fg (int r, int g, int b)
Convert RGB to ANSI foreground color code. char * rgb_to_ansi_bg (int r, int g, int b)
Convert RGB to ANSI background color code. void rgb_to_ansi_8bit (int r, int g, int b, int *fg_code, int *bg_code)
Convert RGB to 8-bit ANSI color codes. char * image_print_256color (const image_t *image, const char *palette)
Print image using 256-color ANSI mode. char * image_print_16color (const image_t *image, const char *palette)
Print image using 16-color ANSI mode. char * image_print_16color_dithered (const image_t *image, const char *palette)
Print image using 16-color ANSI mode with dithering. char * image_print_16color_dithered_with_background (const image_t *image, bool use_background, const char *palette)
Print image using 16-color ANSI mode with dithering and background colors.

Function Documentation

char * image_print_color_utf8 (const image_t * p, const char * palette)

Definition at line 312 of file foreground.c.

312                                                                     {
313   if (!p || !palette || !p->pixels) {
314     return NULL;
315   }
316 
317   utf8_palette_cache_t *utf8_cache = get_utf8_palette_cache(palette);
318   if (!utf8_cache) {
319     return NULL;
320   }
321 
322   const int h = p->h;
323   const int w = p->w;
324   const size_t h_sz = (size_t)h;
325   const size_t w_sz = (size_t)w;
326 
327   if (h_sz > 0 && w_sz > SIZE_MAX / h_sz) {
328     return NULL;
329   }
330 
331   const size_t bytes_per_pixel = 30; // fg sequence (~19) + char (up to 4) + margin
332   const size_t total_pixels = h_sz * w_sz;
333   const size_t lines_size = total_pixels * bytes_per_pixel + h_sz + 16;
334 
335   char *lines;
336   lines = SAFE_MALLOC(lines_size, char *);
337 
338   char *ptr = lines;
339   const rgb_pixel_t *pix = p->pixels;
340 
341   for (int y = 0; y < h; y++) {
342     const int row_offset = y * w;
343 
344     for (int x = 0; x < w; x++) {
345       const rgb_pixel_t pixel = pix[row_offset + x];
346 
347       ptr += SAFE_SNPRINTF(ptr, 20, "\033[38;2;%d;%d;%dm", pixel.r, pixel.g, pixel.b);
348 
349       int luminance = (77 * pixel.r + 150 * pixel.g + 29 * pixel.b + 128) >> 8;
350       uint8_t safe_luminance = clamp_rgb(luminance);
351       const utf8_char_t *char_info = &utf8_cache->cache[safe_luminance];
352       for (int i = 0; i < char_info->byte_len; i++) {
353         *ptr++ = char_info->utf8_bytes[i];
354       }
355     }
356 
357     *ptr++ = '\033';
358     *ptr++ = '[';
359     *ptr++ = '0';
360     *ptr++ = 'm';
361     if (y < h - 1) {
362       *ptr++ = '\n';
363     }
364   }
365 
366   *ptr = '\0';
367   return lines;
368 }




References rgb_pixel_t::b, utf8_char_t::byte_len,
    utf8_palette_cache::cache, rgb_pixel_t::g,
    get_utf8_palette_cache(), image_t::h, image_t::pixels,
    rgb_pixel_t::r, SAFE_MALLOC, SAFE_SNPRINTF,
    utf8_char_t::utf8_bytes, and image_t::w.


Referenced by ascii_convert(), and
    image_print_with_capabilities().
